prompt_replacements.old: List all completed in-person sale records from March 2026.
prompt_replacements.new: List all deleted sales from March 2026.

prompt_replacements.old: Each membership test asks one predicate about one candidate property. Create separate EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT tests for different properties, even when they consume the same input; omit predicates already enforced by answer_expression.
prompt_replacements.new: An EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT narrows the population: MUST_PASS requires a candidate property, while MUST_FAIL excludes it. A permission to include additional candidates belongs to the NORMAL_INSTANCE_GUARD and is not a separate membership test.

prompt_replacements.old:
After writing answer_population, inspect each EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT. When the question supplies a concrete value used by that test, declare the smallest copied value phrase as one predicate_value and reference that input from the test. Do not turn the answer subject or counted unit into an input.
A predicate_value does not identify one particular resource.
prompt_replacements.new: A predicate_value is the concrete value required or excluded by an EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT. Copy the smallest phrase that supplies that value. Population permissions are not predicate values. Do not turn the answer subject or counted unit into an input.
